description: Hybrid retrieval test dataset with keyword and semantic queries
note: Tests keyword precision (sparse) and semantic similarity (dense). Query types: keyword (exact matches), semantic (conceptual), mixed (both help).

queries.query: authentication login credentials password verification user
fetch retrieve query database user record information

documents.text:
Error log showing database operation failure with SQLITE_BUSY timeout exception. The error handling system automatically schedules a retry to recover from the temporary database lock issue.

Error Log [2024-01-15 14:32:01]
Level: WARN
Message: Database operation failed
Error: SQLITE_BUSY timeout after 5000ms
Context: write_lock acquisition failed
Action: Automatic retry scheduled (attempt 2/3)

Documentation for the parseJSON function which provides safe JSON parsing. This function handles various error cases including invalid UTF-8 encoding, malformed JSON syntax, and unexpected end of input.

Usage example:
let result = parseJSON(raw_string)?;

Performance: O(n) where n is input length
